title: primula tetrandra
intro: Primula tetrandra, also known as the Chinese primrose or four-leaved primrose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, where its roots and stems are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Primula tetrandra include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Primula tetrandra can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in herbal teas, capsules, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
